text: A satisfying check. Notice f of z equals e to the negative theta times e to the i natural log r, which is e to the i natural log r minus theta. That's e to the i times open paren natural log r plus i theta close paren. And natural log r plus i theta is exactly the principal log of z. So f of z equals e to the i log z. By chain rule, derivative is i over z times the same thing — i times f over z. Same answer.
